notes: This psalm was probably composed in Chaldea, during the captivity

quotes.text: The yearning of ancient Israel was to Jerusalem. During their captivity, the soul of the people was expressed in the 137th Psalm:
quotes.speaker: William Grant Bangerter
quotes.attr: William Grant Bangerter, in Conference Report, Apr. 1985, 80; or Ensign, May 1985, 64
